url_observed: you.com/search?q=내%20주민등록번호는%20901010-1234567&fromSearchBar=true&chatMode=default (PII routed into GET query string via search/chat submission)
warning_text_observed:
⚠️ 보안 경고
민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.
(This request was blocked due to sensitive information.)
context: W5.1 regression check for you.com. Used CORRECT methodology (url_query_blocked path) per baselines #1255 / #1274 / #1295. Default logged-in Chrome profile '장희'; web-search path routes PII into the GET query string so login not required.
methodology_steps: 2. Typed PII prompt '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' into the 'Ask a question' search box and pressed Enter (submitted as a search/chat query).

3. you.com routed the query into a GET request — URL became you.com/search?q=내%20주민등록번호는%20901010-1234567&fromSearchBar=true&chatMode=default. PII '주민등록번호' carried verbatim in the q= query string => engine url_query_blocked path triggered, block_session set.
4. Waited ~15s for the engine to register block_session, then Ctrl+Shift+R hard reload of the you.com/search URL WITHIN the 5-min window.
5. Page was REPLACED: tab title became '보안 정책 - 접근 차단', SPA content gone, static Korean security-warning toast rendered. Verbatim body captured via clipboard DOM (Ctrl+A / Ctrl+C).
comparison_to_baseline: Verbatim match to baselines #1255 (W3), #1274 (W4+W6), #1295 (W5.0): identical page-replacement delivery (title '보안 정책 - 접근 차단') and identical body '⚠️ 보안 경고 / 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. / (This request was blocked due to sensitive information.)'. NO W5.1 regression in the you.com V6-F page-replacement path.
conclusion: PASS. Query submission carrying PII in the GET query string → engine url_query_blocked → block_session → V6-F request-side page replacement fired on the subsequent hard reload, rendering the Korean block warning containing '차단'. Verdict IDENTICAL to baselines. W5.1 changes did NOT regress the you service path.
